# collective-docs — Local Documentation Collection

> This repository is a curated, auto-updating collection of documentation for
> the tools, APIs, and frameworks I use. It serves as the primary knowledge
> base for AI agents and local development tools.

## Available Sources

### Hermes Agent
- Description: Configuration, setup, tools, skills, and troubleshooting for Hermes Agent (by Nous Research)
- Agent path: agent/hermes/
- Human path: human/hermes/
- Homepage: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs
- Updated: daily

### OpenCode
- Description: OpenCode CLI documentation — features, PR review, coding workflows
- Agent path: agent/opencode/
- Human path: human/opencode/
- Homepage: (source TBD)
- Updated: daily

### DeepSeek
- Description: DeepSeek API documentation — models, endpoints, configuration, rate limits
- Agent path: agent/deepseek/
- Human path: human/deepseek/
- Homepage: (source TBD)
- Updated: daily

## Quick Start for Agents

For keyword search: `python search/search.py --keyword "your query"`
For semantic search: `python search/search.py --semantic "your question"`
For full-text grep: `rg -i "pattern" agent/`

## Cross-References

See cross-refs/relation-graph.json for links between sources found across
different documentation sets.

## Prompt Templates

See prompt-templates/ for pre-built system prompts for answering questions
about specific tools.
